case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK(U.S.A.), N.A. VS. KAREN CARR et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $227.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, KAREN
